'''鈭歬-d-y-ch''' ('''kakadyechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:teabag|teabag]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-d-y-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:teabag|teabag]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-d-y-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kakadyechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikadyechoko|thikadyechoko]] || [[word:jikadyechoko|jikadyechoko]] || [[word:shikadyechoko|shikadyechoko]] || [[word:kikadyechoko|kikadyechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukadyechoko|thuthukadyechoko]] || [[word:jujukadyechoko|jujukadyechoko]] || [[word:shushukadyechoko|shushukadyechoko]] || [[word:kukukadyechoko|kukukadyechoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekadyechoko|thekadyechoko]] || [[word:jekadyechoko|jekadyechoko]] || [[word:shekadyechoko|shekadyechoko]] || [[word:kekadyechoko|kekadyechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokadyechoko|thothokadyechoko]] || [[word:jojokadyechoko|jojokadyechoko]] || [[word:shoshokadyechoko|shoshokadyechoko]] || [[word:kokokadyechoko|kokokadyechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokadyechoko|thokadyechoko]] || [[word:jokadyechoko|jokadyechoko]] || [[word:shokadyechoko|shokadyechoko]] || [[word:kokadyechoko|kokadyechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokadyechoko|thokadyechoko]] || [[word:jokadyechoko|jokadyechoko]] || [[word:shokadyechoko|shokadyechoko]] || [[word:kokadyechoko|kokadyechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙kadyechoko|th忙kadyechoko]] || [[word:j忙kadyechoko|j忙kadyechoko]] || [[word:sh忙kadyechoko|sh忙kadyechoko]] || [[word:k忙kadyechoko|k忙kadyechoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakadyechoko|thakadyechoko]] || [[word:jakadyechoko|jakadyechoko]] || [[word:shakadyechoko|shakadyechoko]] || [[word:kakadyechoko|kakadyechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakadyechoko|thakadyechoko]] || [[word:jakadyechoko|jakadyechoko]] || [[word:shakadyechoko|shakadyechoko]] || [[word:kakadyechoko|kakadyechoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
